tool_input.command:
.venv/bin/python - <<'EOF'
import torch, numpy as np
from model.model import build_model, loss_fn, export_onnx, GRID_K, MACRO_K, FINE_K

torch.manual_seed(0)
m = build_model()
x = torch.rand(5, 3, 128, 128)
out, logits = m(x, return_logits=True)
print("out", out.shape, out.min().item(), out.max().item())
macro_logits, fine_logits_all = logits
print("macro_logits", macro_logits.shape, "fine_logits_all", fine_logits_all.shape)

target = torch.rand(5, 2) * 0.999
loss = loss_fn(out, logits, target)
print("loss", loss.item())
loss.backward()
# check every param got a gradient
missing = [n for n, p in m.named_parameters() if p.grad is None]
print("params missing grad:", missing)

# param count
n_params = sum(p.numel() for p in m.parameters())
print("n_params", n_params)

# export
import tempfile, os
path = tempfile.mktemp(suffix=".onnx")
export_onnx(m, path)
size = os.path.getsize(path)
print("onnx size bytes", size, "MiB", size/1024/1024)

import onnxruntime as ort
sess = ort.InferenceSession(path, providers=["CPUExecutionProvider"])
dummy = np.zeros((1,3,128,128), dtype=np.float32)
res = sess.run(None, {"frame": dummy})
print("onnx out", res[0])

x2 = np.random.rand(1,3,128,128).astype(np.float32)
res2 = sess.run(None, {"frame": x2})
print("onnx out2", res2[0])
EOF

.venv/bin/python -c "
import time, numpy as np, onnxruntime as ort
opts = ort.SessionOptions()
opts.intra_op_num_threads = 1
opts.inter_op_num_threads = 1
sess = ort.InferenceSession('/tmp/x.onnx' if False else None, sess_options=opts) if False else None
" 2>&1 | tail -5
